hotels.name: ГҰв„ўВҙГЈЖ’В¬ГЈЖ’В«ГҘВ®В¶ ГҘЛҶВҘГҘВәЕ“ hareruya beppu

LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement ГҰв„ўВҙГЈЖ’В¬ГЈЖ’В«ГҘВ®В¶ ГҘЛҶВҘГҘВәЕ“ hareruya beppu se trouve ГғВ  Beppu, ГғВ  respectivement 21 km et 300 mГғВЁtres de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Crasus Dome ГғвҖўita et Gare de Beppu. Il propose des hГғВ©bergements dotГғВ©s de la climatisation et dГўвӮ¬в„ўune salle de bains commune. De nombreux ГғВ©quipements et services sont fournis sur place, notamment une cuisine commune, un salon commun et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite disponible dans l'ensemble des locaux. Cet ГғВ©tablissement non-fumeurs vous accueille ГғВ  13 km de : Gare d'Г…Е’ita.
Les hГғВ©bergements disposent dГўвӮ¬в„ўune bouilloire ГғВ©lectrique. La salle de bains commune comprend une douche, des articles de toilette gratuits et un sГғВЁche-cheveux. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: ГҰв„ўВҙГЈЖ’В¬ГЈЖ’В«ГҘВ®В¶ ГҘЛҶВҘГҘВәЕ“ hareruya beppu in Beppu offers a hostel experience with free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a ground-floor unit. Guests can enjoy streaming services, a lounge, and a games room.
Convenient Facilities: The hostel features a shared kitchen, dining area, and luggage storage. Additional amenities include a tea and coffee maker, hairdryer, microwave, and electric kettle. Free toiletries and a shower are available in the shared bathroom.
Local Attractions: Beppu Station is a 3-minute walk away, while Beppu Tower lies 500 metres nearby. Other points of interest include the Statue of Kumahachi Aburaya (4-minute walk), Beppu Art Museum (8-minute walk), and Yayoi Tengu (600 metres). Oita Airport is 37 km from the property.
hotels.description_es:
ГҰв„ўВҙГЈЖ’В¬ГЈЖ’В«ГҘВ®В¶ ГҘЛҶВҘГҘВәЕ“ hareruya beppu, que se encuentra a 21 km de Estadio del Gran Ojo de Oita y a 3 min a pie de EstaciГғВіn de tren de Beppu, ofrece habitaciones con aire acondicionado y baГғВұo compartido en Beppu. Este alojamiento ofrece cocina compartida y salГғВіn de uso comГғВәn, ademГғВЎs de wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento. Este alojamiento libre de humo estГғВЎ a 13 km de EstaciГғВіn Oita.
Las habitaciones de este alojamiento estГғВЎn equipadas con hervidor. El baГғВұo compartido estГғВЎ equipado con ducha, artГғВӯculos de aseo gratuitos y secador de pelo. En el albergue, cada habitaciГғВіn incluye ropa de cama y toallas.
Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interГғВ©s como Beppu Tower, Statue of Kumahachi Aburaya y Select Beppu. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Oita) estГғВЎ a 37 km.
hotels.description_pt:
A cerca de 21 km de Crasus Dome Oita e a 3 minutos a pГғВ© de EstaГғВ§ГғВЈo FerroviГғВЎria de Beppu, ГҰв„ўВҙГЈЖ’В¬ГЈЖ’В«ГҘВ®В¶ ГҘЛҶВҘГҘВәЕ“ hareruya beppu fornece quartos com ar condicionado e casa de banho partilhada em Beppu. As comodidades deste alojamento incluem uma cozinha partilhada e um salГғВЈo partilhado, assim como acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade. Este alojamento nГғВЈo fumador localiza-se a 13 km de EstaГғВ§ГғВЈo FerroviГғВЎria de Oita.
Todos os quartos do alojamento estГғВЈo equipados com chaleira. A casa de banho partilhada dispГғВөe de chuveiro, produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos e um secador de cabelo. Os quartos providenciam roupa de cama e toalhas.
ГҰв„ўВҙГЈЖ’В¬ГЈЖ’В«ГҘВ®В¶ ГҘЛҶВҘГҘВәЕ“ hareruya beppu tem vГғВЎrios pontos de interesse populares nas suas proximidades, incluindo Beppu Tower, Statue of Kumahachi Aburaya e Select Beppu.
hotels.description_it:
Situato a 21 km da Stadio Г…Е’ita e 300 metri da Stazione di Beppu, ГҰв„ўВҙГЈЖ’В¬ГЈЖ’В«ГҘВ®В¶ ГҘЛҶВҘГҘВәЕ“ hareruya beppu prevede camere con aria condizionata e bagno in comune, a Beppu. Tra i servizi di questa struttura cГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВЁ una cucina in comune e una sala comune, oltre al WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura. L'alloggio ГғВЁ interamente non fumatori ed ГғВЁ ubicato a 13 km da Stazione di Oita.
Le camere presso questo ostello dispongono di un bollitore elettrico. Il bagno in comune dispone di doccia, set di cortesia e asciugacapelli. Presso ГҰв„ўВҙГЈЖ’В¬ГЈЖ’В«ГҘВ®В¶ ГҘЛҶВҘГҘВәЕ“ hareruya beppu, tutte le camere comprendono lenzuola e asciugamani.
I luoghi di interesse piГғВ№ famosi nei dintorni di questa struttura includono Beppu Tower, Statue of Kumahachi Aburaya e Select Beppu. Aeroporto di Oita si trova a 37 km di distanza.

Relaxing Facilities: A hot spring bath and free WiFi are available. Additional amenities include air-conditioning, streaming services, and a washing machine. Private check-in and check-out services ensure a seamless arrival and departure.
Convenient Location: Located in Beppu, the property is 34 km from Oita Airport. Nearby attractions include the Oita Fragrance Museum (8-minute walk), Yama Jigoku (1.7 km), and Hells of Beppu (1.9 km). Free on-site private parking is provided.

Cet appartement avec climatisation se compose de 2 chambres sГғВ©parГғВ©es, d'une cuisine entiГғВЁrement ГғВ©quipГғВ©e et de 1 salle de bains. Une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat est disponible.

Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  respectivement 24 km et 25 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Gare d'Asahikawa-YojГ…ВҚ et Tokiwa Park. L'aГғВ©roport le plus proche (AГғВ©roport d'Asahikawa) est ГғВ  9 km.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Living: White Birch in Biei offers a two-bedroom apartment with one bathroom. The property includes air-conditioning, a washing machine, a fully equipped kitchen, and a TV. Free WiFi is available throughout the apartment.
Convenient Facilities: Guests benefit from free on-site private parking and a washing machine. The apartment ensures a comfortable and relaxing stay with all necessary amenities.
Prime Location: Located 9 km from Asahikawa Airport, White Birch is 1.4 km from Ikoigamori Park. Nearby attractions include Furano Station at 32 km and Windy Garden at 37 km.
Distance in property description is calculated using ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
White Birch se encuentra en Biei y ofrece alojamiento a 37 km de Wind Garden, a 22 km de Kaguraoka Park y a 23 km de Ayako Miura Literature Museum. El alojamiento estГғВЎ a 32 km de EstaciГғВіn de tren de Furano y ofrece parking privado en el propio alojamiento y wifi gratis.

Este apartamento con aire acondicionado consta de 2 dormitorios, una cocina y 1 baГғВұo. Se ofrece TV de pantalla plana.

EstaciГғВіn de Asahikawa-YojГ…ВҚ estГғВЎ a 24 km del alojamiento, y Tokiwa Park estГғВЎ a 25 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Asahikawa) estГғВЎ a 9 km.

Cette maison de vacances avec climatisation se compose de 2 chambres, d'un salon, d'une cuisine entiГғВЁrement ГғВ©quipГғВ©e avec un rГғВ©frigГғВ©rateur et une machine ГғВ  cafГғВ©, ainsi que de 1 salle de bains avec un bidet et une douche. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont ГғВ  disposition.
hotels.description_en:
Spacious Holiday Home in Biei: BIEI TERRACE 2nd Floor offers a spacious, recently renovated holiday home in Biei. The property features two bedrooms, a living room, and a modern bathroom.
Comfortable Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, streaming services, and a washing machine. The fully equipped kitchen includes a coffee machine, microwave, and dishwasher. Additional amenities include a work desk, sofa bed, and free toiletries.
Convenient Location: Located 1.9 km from Ikoigamori Park and 9 km from Asahikawa Airport, the property provides easy access to local attractions. Furano Station is 33 km away, while Windy Garden is 38 km from the property.
Nearby Points of Interest: Nearby attractions include Kaguraoka Park and Ayako Miura Literature Museum, both 22 km away.

hotels.description_it:
A 33 km da Stazione di Furano a Biei, BIEI TERRACE 2nd Floor - 2FГҘВ°вҖҡГ§вҖқВЁГ§вҖ№В¬Г§В«вҖ№Г§ЕҪвҖһГ©вҖ“Вў - 2FГҘВҚВ ГҰЕ“вҖ°127ГҘВ№ВіГ§ВұВі2LDK - ГҘВӨВ§ГҘЕҫвҖ№ГЈЖ’ВҗГЈвҖҡВ№ГЈЖ’В«ГЈЖ’ВјГЈЖ’В , 85ГҘЕҫвҖ№ГЈвҖҡВ№ГЈЖ’ЕҫГЈЖ’ВјГЈЖ’ЛҶTV, Г§вҖһВЎГҰвҖ“в„ўWi-Fi -Г©В§вҖҰГҘвҖ°ВҚГ©вӮ¬ЕЎГЈвҖҡЕ ГҰв„ўВҜГЁВҰВіГҰВқВЎГӨВҫвҖ№ГҰЕ’вҖЎГҘВ®ЕЎГҘЕ“В°ГҘЕ’Вә mette a disposizione un alloggio con vista sulla cittГғВ , WiFi gratuito e parcheggio privato gratuito. In un edificio risalente al 2009, questa casa vacanze ГғВЁ a 38 km da Giardino del Vento e 22 km da Kaguraoka Park.
Questa casa vacanze con aria condizionata comprende 2 camere da letto, un soggiorno, una cucina con utensili, frigorifero e macchina da caffГғВЁ, e 1 bagno con bidet e doccia. Presso questa casa vacanze troverete asciugamani e lenzuola a disposizione.
Ayako Miura Literature Museum ГғВЁ a 22 km da questa casa vacanze, mentre Stazione di Asahikawa-YojГ…ВҚ si trova a 24 km di distanza. Aeroporto di Asahikawa si trova a 9 km dalla struttura.
